tasks.name: create-skills-agent
tasks.task:
source_report: ~/docs/knowledge-review-agent.md
knowledge_dir: knowledge/agent

Read the Skill Candidates section of source_report. If there are no candidates, stop — nothing to do.

For each candidate:
1. Read the source knowledge file.
2. Read .claude/skills/meta-pipeline-creator/SKILL.md as a format reference.
3. Create .claude/skills/<name>/SKILL.md with correct frontmatter (name, description, paths, disable-model-invocation: true) and workflow instructions derived from the knowledge content. The content must be actionable steps, not passive documentation.

tasks.name: create-skills-commit
tasks.task: Run `git status` to see what skill files were created. Stage all changes in .claude/skills/ with `git add .claude/skills/` and commit with a conventional commit message (e.g. `feat(skills): extract skill definitions from knowledge audit`). If there is nothing to commit, stop.
